title: Salt Air & Slow Days in Okinawa
description: Okinawa at sunset is almost too much — the sky goes orange, the sea turns gold, and everything below settles into silhouette.
coverAlt: Golden sunset over a coastal bay in Okinawa, captured from an amazing homestay
